name: Arugula & Tomato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry the arugula. Remove the tough stems and arrange on the outside of a platter.
2. Whisk together the olive oil, vinegar, and Dijon mustard in a bowl. Add salt and pepper to taste.
3. Gently toss the tomatoes in the dressing.
4. Strain the tomatoes and place them in the center of the arugula.
5. Drizzle the strained dressing over the arugula.
